arts.ttl: Cameron Carter-Vickers believes Celtic have grown stronger in the Champions League
arts.sum: Cameron Carter Vickers knows Celtic are capable of holding their own in Europe.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers channels the 'power' of Celtic Park as he goes after rare 4 in a row in the Champions League
arts.sum: The Hoops boss is gearing up for another massive night of European action in the east end of Glasgow

arts.ttl: The magic number of points Celtic believe they need to achieve Champions League qualification
arts.sum: Defender Cameron Carter-Vickers has told how the players set themselves a target at the outset

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers cites Leipzig reference point as Celtic look to give Brugge a 'really difficult night'
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has laid the gauntlet down to his Celtic side as they prepare to take on Club Brugge in the Champions League tomorrow night. “But I know this club and I know the fans and I know the stadium, so I know how special it really is and how difficult is can be, but what you have to do is match that with the performance and that’s something that has really pleased me in these recent home games in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: £60m-rated ex Celtic trialist available for loan from Premier League outfit as January window looms
arts.sum: Parkhead boss Rodgers was in the market for a third striker last summer to provide competition for Kyogo and Adam Idah

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney boost emerges as Mikel Arteta heralds 'great news' involving former Celtic star
arts.sum: Sharing the development, Arteta said via his latest Arsenal press conference: “Everybody here is fully fit to start the game and a bonus as well because we have Kieran Tierney with us after a long injury. Former Celtic star Kieran Tierney returns to first-team action

arts.ttl: 8 things we spotted at Celtic training as Brendan Rodgers' Ninja gets ready for Champions League mission
arts.sum: The Parkhead side can take a big step towards qualification for the knockout stages with victory

arts.ttl: Rangers 'interested' in Leeds Utd misfit Joe Gelhardt amid Celtic red tape as Josh Doig 'flattered' by talks
arts.sum: A big January could be needed at Ibrox despite their limited spending power

arts.ttl: Josh Doig opens up on Celtic transfer speculation and thoughts on Parkhead atmosphere
arts.sum: “Obviously I’m not saying that going to Rangers or Celtic would be a bad thing, but it’s just like I’ve got away from it. Growing up, Celtic or Rangers it’s the two biggest teams you could play for in Scotland.

arts.ttl: Club Brugge star on why he is 'full of confidence' ahead of Champions League battle with Celtic
arts.sum: Celtic are in Champions League action tomorrow night against Club Brugge as they look to cement their place in the knockout playoff phase of the competition. Speaking ahead of Brugge’s trip to Parkhead, Tzolis admitted that his side are expecting a ‘difficult match’ against Celtic, but he is unsurprisingly feeling confident after a four-goal splurge last weekend.
